notes: v1.7.4 — THE APP ICON (SVG-authored, token-true). Promotes PHANTOM's own ghost to the app icon — NOT an AI image. The master is icon.svg, authored from the in-app .ico-ghost path geometry (the rounded-head, three-scallop ghost already shipped in the UI) + brand tokens (violet #b478ff top -> cyan #9af6ff base, matching the logotype run). Filter-free by design (glows are radial gradients + layered strokes, not feGaussianBlur) so any rasterizer renders it identically. ASSETS (4 committed SVG masters + derived PNGs): icon.svg (1024, edge-to-edge: dark #020408 bg + one subtle violet radial glow + the gradient-stroked ghost over a dark translucent fill, glowing cyan-white eyes as the focal point, small mouth, a <=6% rack-glow whisper at the bottom edge that survived the 60px gate); icon-maskable.svg (ghost scaled into the central ~80% safe zone, dark full-bleed); favicon.svg (simplified for tiny sizes — bigger ghost, thicker rim, larger eyes, NO mouth/halos — reads at 16px); og.svg (1200x630 link-preview card, the one text-allowed asset: ghost left + Audiowide PHANTOM wordmark in the violet->cyan gradient + mono subtitle). Rendered via @resvg/resvg-js to replace the existing PNGs (same names): apple-touch-icon.png(180), icon-192.png, icon-512.png, favicon-32.png(from master), favicon-16.png(from the simplified variant), manifest-og.png(1200x630), plus NEW icon-512-maskable.png. GATES PASSED (rendered + eyeballed): 60px legibility (reads 'ghost' instantly), maskable safe-zone (ghost not clipped under a circle mask), identity (exact in-app .ico-ghost geometry — same creature, no drift). WIRING: manifest.json icons array expanded to 16/32/180/192/512 (purpose any) + icon-512-maskable (purpose maskable); theme_color/background_color already #020408 (app-coherent, no drift). The spec assumed favicon + OG wiring 'already exists' — it did NOT, so this cut ADDED the missing wiring: favicon-16/32 <link> tags + og:image/twitter:image/twitter:card meta (the OG card was an orphan asset before). sw.js does not precache icons; standard CACHE_VERSION bump only. INVARIANTS held: master is SVG in the repo, PNGs are derived (never hand-edited; regenerable via tools/render-icons.js + @resvg/resvg-js + Audiowide TTF); brand tokens only; no text in any icon (manifest-og excepted); one subject; edge-to-edge. Built via recon-workflow (geometry/wiring/tooling) -> author + render + visual-gate -> adversarial review. node --check 2/2 + sw.js OK, JSON valid (manifest + version), block-0 braces UNCHANGED at 2566 (no app CSS), three stamps v1.7.4. ON-DEVICE (John): iOS will NOT refresh an installed PWA icon in place — REMOVE the home-screen app and RE-ADD it to see the new ghost; confirm on home screen, app switcher, and desktop-tab favicon.
